resources.string: We need your permission for Recording Audio and Writing in external storage for proper functioning of Tools application
Put any side (including the back) of your device on a flat horizontal surface and press the Calibrate button.\n\nOr reset the calibration for all the phone sides.
Please enter a number, select your units and tap \'Convert\'
Do you want to delete this product?
Are you sure you would like to delete this file?
Minimum and maximum Range is empty
Minimum range is greater than Maximum Range
You did not enter a number to convert... Did you forget?
"There was an incorrect unit value found in strings.xml. The app will now exit."
"There was a profile found in strings.xml with less than 2 units. This is not supported. The app will now exit."
In order to use this app you need the GPS to be enabled.
Product name can not be empty.
Tap the button to start recording
What would you like to convert today?
The file %1$s already exists. Please choose a different file name.
"The app could not find the units and/or values of a profile listed in strings.xml. The app will now exit."
"The number of units and unit values provided in strings.xml don\'t match. The app will now exit."
